/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -Wall -Wextra -O2 CMakeFiles/rpc_server_pb.dir/examples/rpc_server_pb.cpp.o -o rpc_server_pb  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ly/workspaces/im/muduo-im/build/third_party/mymuduo-http:/usr/local/lib libmymuduo.so librpc_proto.a /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread
